description: This file defines a Backdrop class for managing modal backdrops in Bootstrap, including methods for showing, hiding, and disposing of the backdrop element, as well as handling animations and events.

classes.name: Backdrop
classes.description: A class for managing modal backdrop elements, including display, hide, dispose, and configuration handling.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Displays the backdrop, optionally with animation, and executes a callback after showing.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the backdrop, optionally with animation, and executes a callback after hiding.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Removes the backdrop element from the DOM and cleans up event handlers.

methods.name: _getElement
methods.description: Creates and returns the backdrop DOM element, applying classes based on configuration.

methods.name: _configAfterMerge
methods.description: Merges configuration with default values and resolves the root element.

methods.name: _append
methods.description: Appends the backdrop element to the DOM and sets up event handlers.

methods.name: _emulateAnimation
methods.description: Simulates animation transition and executes callback after transition.
